svg.title: Sage.Education brochure - two panel layout for ABS DOC
svg.desc: A bifold brochure with company information on the left and contact details on the right, using purple decorative circles and circular photo frames.

text.tspan: ABC DOC is a platform that connects people with
life coaches and therapists. We want to help you
achieve your goals, whether it's starting a business
or getting over an addiction. We work with our
clients to create a customized plan that helps them
reach their goals in an affordable way.
ABC DOC's mission is simple: to connect people
with the resources they need to live their best lives.
We believe that everyone deserves access to quality
healthcare and mental health services, regardless
of their income level or insurance status. ABC DOC
is here to make sure that happens—and we're here
for you too!
We know that sometimes when you're trying to
achieve something big, it helps to have someone by
your side who understands exactly what you're
going through—and is there for you every step of
the way.
Reach Your Goals. Build Relationships.
Feel Better About Yourself.
